name: AllSome
description: Developer of e-commerce fulfillment software intended to provide parcel tracking systems to track packages delivered from online e-commerce sites. The company's software offers a cross-border fulfillment option to track, and get notified for easy order management without heavy investments, enabling companies to take care of their online businesses.

name: Arka
description: Manufacturer of customized packaging products intended to provide an easy and quick way to design custom product packaging boxes. The company's products are completely automated online, automatically matched with the location of the client to the closest supplier from its network to expedite and localize the entire process as well as gives clients an easy-to-use interface to customize, a dashboard to view and track their packaging evolution, enabling clients to easily obtain high-quality custom packaging at affordable rates.

name: Blassa Inc.
description: Blassa optimizes the collection of user delivery information to help eCommerce players eliminate delivery failures and increase conversion rates.

name: Boxc
description: Developer of an e-commerce logistics management platform designed to eliminate the limitations of standard shipping and logistics solutions. The company's platform leverages the existing and underutilized infrastructure and provides all the tools for international e-commerce logistics management in a single platform, enabling logistics companies and e-commerce retailers to build their own international shipping solutions.

name: Polymer
description: Developer of universal retrieval engine designed to help businesses connect external data sources to their large language models (LLM). The company's system connects external data to vector databases, enabling clients to ingest unstructured data wherever it is stored to enhance capabilities and insights for businesses using large language models.

name: Cargobase
description: Developer of a SaaS-based logistics platform designed to automate all procurement and freight management processes between enterprise shippers and logistics providers. The company's platform helps enterprise shippers to reduce logistics spending and save time with quoting, booking, management, and analysis of on-demand air, ocean, parcel, rail, and road shipments from their private pool of logistics providers, enabling clients to manage on-demand freight effectively.

name: Carnot Fleet
description: Developer of logistics technology designed to offer technology-driven means for cold storage transport on all forms of mobility.

name: Cloud Commerce
description: Developer of a cross-border e-commerce platform designed to connect product data with the online markets globally. The company's platform provides features such as posting products, updating stock, managing orders and connecting transportation systems automatically, enabling online sellers to manage their online marketplace worldwide.

name: COSY
description: Developer of AI and computer vision technology designed to serve the retail and warehouse sector. The company's technology delivers scheduled physical inventory with minimal human intervention and utilizes deep learning methods for automated learning, exploring, and mapping of new environments, enabling retail businesses to improve inventory management operations in warehouses.

name: Dagangan
description: Developer of an online distribution platform designed to help businesses to connect with consumers in rural villages. The company's tech platform supports a hub-and-spoke distribution model, that serves rural consumers by providing access for rural consumers to purchase daily necessities products offered by a network of principals or producers at affordable prices, enabling businesses to cut costs and reach out to more customers with data-driven production and supply-chain distribution of their products.

name: DEZPAX
description: Operator of a food packing company intended to provide comprehensive food packing alternatives. The company allows simple customization ordering and designing for clients' packaging and printing solutions, as well as logo printing food box straps, stickers, glass sleeves and screen printing, enabling clients to provide food packing that is made with biodegradable materials.

name: Digital Mortar
description: Developer of an in-store customer tracking system designed to provide full path customer analytics. The company's full SaaS in-store customer tracking system includes video and camera tracking and is designed to provide robust cloud-based data collection and integration of (PoS), enabling brick-and-mortar retailers to drive store layout, merchandising, and staff optimization.

name: Easyship
description: Developer of an online platform designed to provide cross-border logistic services to eCommerce companies. The company's platform provides the trusted tools to fulfill orders, scale growth, elevate customer experiences, and also provides access to more than a hundred shipping companies, enabling clients to get an end-to-end process for pickup, packing, labeling, shipping, and tracking of goods easily.

name: enhance
description: Provider of business development services intended to build vertical marketplaces. The company's services include building businesses from the ground up, with the local market and consumers' needs in mind, and introducing mature models invested in by strategic global venture capital partners, enabling entrepreneurs from the Middle East and Africa to build mobile-enabled businesses.

name: Fazla Gida
description: Developer of a waste management platform designed to help businesses recover value out of food surplus. The company's platform reduces waste-related costs with data-driven recommendations and maximizes tax benefits with donations, provides quality into shrinkage, and helps in transporting food, enabling businesses to connect with foodbanks helping them to deliver the unsold food to non-profit communities, and people in need while preventing wastage of food.

name: Flycrates
description: Operator of an online logistics platform intended to provide international shipping. The company offers a web-based platform, as well as a Chrome extension, enabling users to purchase from Amazon internationally and get delivered to their doorstep.

name: Food Market Hub
description: Operator of a procurement and inventory management platform intended to help restaurants to control purchasing. The company's platform offers features like central kitchen management, integration with accounting and POS, notification via various mediums, and inventory management, enabling clients to easily integrate the entire value chain from the farm to the restaurant.

name: FreightRoll
description: Developer of a digital trade documentation and visibility platform designed to improve visibility into the supply chain. The company's platform provides a dashboard that features access to a proprietary network of carriers, book shipments, uploads loading statuses and prevents deadhead, enabling users to operate shipping activities efficiently.

name: Freshket
description: Operator of a web-based platform intended for restaurant supply management. The company's marketplace offers tools to find vendors and buy or sell fresh ingredients effortlessly through its connective marketplace and order management system, enabling clients to increase their business transaction efficiency, and information transparency and improve profitability.

name: Giztix
description: Operator of a transportation booking platform intended to check transportation and freight prices instantly. The company's platform manages fleets for free, books truck and tracks the shipment status in real time and gathers transporters for shippers for various types of full truckload services, enabling clients to compare shipping prices and book transportation services safely by starting a conversation with the transporter directly.

name: Glife
description: Operator of a food technology company intended to empower and uplift smallholder farmers and businesses with technology. The company focuses on sourcing, storage, packing, and distribution, enabling clients to reduce the risk of mishandling, damage, and contamination.

name: GoGet
description: Developer of a demand workforce platform designed to offer reliable and skilled manpower. The company's platform transforms the traditional labor market, no longer do people have to choose only between a full-time job or an eight-hour working shift, enabling businesses to grow their operations with a dynamic on-demand workforce to increase productivity and save costs.

name: Haulio
description: Developer of container shipping platform designed to transform ports and optimize resources more effectively. The company's platform offers a marketplace that connects users with a network of carriers and other stakeholders like freight forwarders, drivers, and port operators, enabling haulers to connect and help one another through a single trusted system, enabling logistics businesses to save time and resources while improving visibility and reliability for end customers.

name: InnerSpace
description: Developer of an indoor mapping and location intelligence platform designed to improve the usage of indoor space. The company's platform gives insight into how people use their space which drives revenue and improves operations in their smart buildings, enabling businesses to access data to action and utilize indoor spaces more efficiently.

name: Instanture
description: Our suite of AI SAAS help brand & distributor to manage their order & pay operation across multiple sales channels

name: Kaizntree Inc.
description: AI powered Inventory Software for Small Batch Manufacturers

name: Logiless
description: Developer of an inventory management platform designed to collectively manage orders and inventory. The company's platform automates the work of e-commerce business from ordering to shipping eliminating manual work from order receipt to shipment, realizing speedy shipment, enabling warehouse operators to improve their productivity.

name: MaxAB
description: Developer of a logistic application designed to connect food and grocery retailers to suppliers. The company's application re-engineers the informal grocery and food market using technology to fit the needs of retailers, reducing costs, time, and effort, enabling retailers to manage procurement and grocery delivery to shops.

name: Mile
description: Provider of logistics platform intended to revolutionize logistics from the first to the last mile that makes enterprise Tech Stack the bedrock for fleet operators. The company's seamlessly integrated logistics and commerce platform digitally orchestrates the transfiguration of intricate operations from fleet and warehouse management to fulfilment storage, merchant oversight, and marketplace commerce, thereby empowering enterprises to elevate their operations to unprecedented levels of efficiency and productivity.

name: myBOX
description: Provider of storage services intended to help people to keep their important goods safely. The company's storage services offers containers, hanger boxes, documents boxes and other storage facilities and also provides free shipping and pickup services, enabling individuals to keep their goods with full safety.

name: Nizthewiz
description: Developer of a delivery application designed to offer same day logistics and courier services. The company's application provides crowd-sourced courier fleet providing full transparency of the last mile delivery cycle which empowers users with live GPS tracking for all deliveries every step, enabling e-commerce and logistics industry to directly communicate their requirements and manage their own outcomes.

name: Nuve
description: Developer of a sensor-based technology and a mobile application designed to prevent the theft of fuel and cargo. The company utilizes sensors technology to offer an asset protection system with real-time notifications, enabling businesses to better protect, control and monitor their cargo.

name: OrderCircle
description: Operator of a B2B e-commerce platform intended to manage wholesale orders. The company's platform leverages technology to accept and manage wholesale ordering with inventory, invoices, customer management, and multi-language support, enabling companies to simplify whole order management.

name: Ordoro
description: Developer of e-commerce logistics platform designed to track supply chains and orders. The company's application uses an open application programming interface (API) to integrate with major marketplaces and shopping cart platforms, enabling merchants to streamline their shipping and inventory management across all their sales channels so they can focus on growing their business.

name: Parcel Perform
description: Developer of a carrier-independent delivery management platform designed to improve the e-commerce customer checkout experience. The company's logistics management platform is an easy-to-use self-service tracking dashboard and also provides a B2C-based free tracking service for end-consumers, enabling merchants to track their global and local carriers and offering them the opportunity to send shoppers continuous updates about the status of their shipments in real time.

name: Partender
description: Developer of bar inventory management software designed for reducing dead stock and eliminating waste or theft. The company's software reduces the time taken by owners and managers to do bar inventory from hours to minutes by digitizing the archaic paper-pen-clipboard process into a few taps and swipes on smartphones, enabling bar managers to gain deeper insights into the inventory levels of their bars.

name: Phasio
description: Developer of digital manufacturing platform designed to make operations nimble and efficient at scale for SME (small-to-medium enterprise) businesses. The company makes ordering parts, designing parts, and communicating with customers seamless, enabling clients to maximize productivity.

name: Printify
description: Provider of on-demand custom printing services intended to create and sell custom products. The company's services include apparel, wall art, home decor, and accessories printing design which is directly shipped to the customers with a fully automated process, enabling e-commerce store owners to save time in printing and grow their business.

name: Quickshipper
description: Developer of a fleet management platform designed to assist businesses in managing their deliveries efficiently. The company's platform helps businesses boost their fleet productivity by providing necessary tools for daily operations as well as offering optimal roots to deliver the products, enabling shopping businesses to enhance their productivity.

name: Got-its
description: Developer of Bluetooth labels designed to keep track of shared things at work as tools. The company's labels automatically track anything, keep an audit trail of things moving, and integrate into ERP systems, enabling companies to keep track of inventory, assets, and orders.

name: Ruedata
description: Developer of fleet management software designed to manage and optimize the savings of the tires. The company's software uses data analysis technology and automated learning algorithms to offer maintenance, compliance planning, and abnormal wear and cost overrun data, enabling clients to increase the profitability of their transport fleet by having updated information online.

name: Salasa
description: Operator of an e-commerce fulfillment company intended to help merchants scale up their business. The company offers ways, tools, and resources including handling and storing products, order processing, fast shipping, and return management, enabling e-commerce businesses to provide their customers with a seamless online shopping experience that helps them to generate sales and develop their brand.

name: Shiplyst
description: Operator of a managed ocean freight procurement marketplace intended to let people search and compare ocean freight rates from various shipping lines. The company's platform offers transparent and real-time tracking, data security through industrial-grade encryption, global marketplace to choose freight forwarders of choice, enabling clients to receive end-to-end container shipment service at reduced costs, thereby increasing efficiency.

name: Shippio
description: Operator of a logistics platform intended to manage the development and deployment of shipping logistics. The company's platform offers a dedicated dashboard for import and export management with the streamlined arrangement of import or export processes, centralized management of large amounts of data, and speedy customer support, enabling shipping companies to create the necessary documents for importing and exporting transactions, saving time and cost.

name: Popout
description: Developer of a multi-carrier shipping software designed to assist businesses to succeed through shipping. The company's platform provides an API and dashboard to assist merchants and platforms in getting real-time rates, printing labels, automating international paperwork, tracking packages, and facilitating returns, enabling businesses to find suitable delivery option that matches their requirements.

name: ShopandBox
description: Operator of a peer-to-peer personal shopping platform designed to connect shoppers around the world. The company's platform pairs shoppers with people, based on shopping interests and geographical location, who buy the product and ship it to them, enabling consumers to connect with a group of personal shoppers to shop anywhere and anytime.

name: VOO
description: Provider of e-commerce middleman shipping services intended to connect business owners with the best match of couriers. The company manages and follows the last-mile delivery with courier companies and offers different payment options, a dashboard to extract data and numbers to analyze and compare profits and revenue on a given date, pickups, and insurance options for the products, enabling small and medium enterprises to cut costs, find preferred couriers and increase the delivery success rate.

name: Simpliroute
description: Developer of a navigation platform designed for route optimization services. The company's platform provides ways to help any last-mile company make their deliveries efficiently by automating their process with an easy-to-use platform and automates their process with an easy-to-use platform, enabling businesses to organize their deliveries and visits with minimum effort.

name: Spaceship
description: Spaceship powers global e-commerce with one platform for shipping and fulfillment.

name: SpotHero
description: Developer of a mobile parking application designed to make parking facilities future-proofed, cities more accessible and the world more connected. The company's application connects parking lots, parking garages, and valet services and exchanges data and payments, enabling customers to reserve parking spots, compare rates, and find open parking.

name: Swept
description: Developer of an operational cleaning management platform designed to oversee commercial cleaning businesses. The company's platform assists cleaning companies in communicating with employees and customers, completing inspections, and ordering supplies in real-time, enabling companies to increase profits and customer retention.

name: SynapseMX
description: Developer of a cloud-based aircraft maintenance software designed to help teams to plan, track and accomplish aircraft maintenance. The company's cloud-based software minimizes the duration of maintenance events, improves management, provides real-time updates and operational insights from a simple interface on any device, enabling aircraft maintenance teams to streamline aircraft turnaround times during unscheduled maintenance works.

name: Transfercar
description: Operator of rental cars and campervans intended to reduce costs in freight services. The company matches those in need of a free rental car with rental car companies that need to reposition their fleet and delivers financial benefits to both rental car companies and flexible travelers, enabling customers to book cars at competitive fares.

name: TruKKer
description: Developer of a logistics and fleet management platform designed to simplify road freight and logistics operations. The company's platform aids in integrating available trucks to the users in real-time and integrates capacity with demand accordingly to ensure maximum asset utilization to reduce overall transportation costs, enabling shippers, carriers, and businesses to get cross-border transportation services with ease.

name: Venzee
description: Venzee Technologies Inc is engaged in developing software infrastructure retailers. It develops and markets a cloud-based platform that suppliers and manufacturers from multiple industries use to share their product information and inventory updates, in real-time, with their retailers. The Company operates in one operating segment, which is a cloud-based platform solution targeted to online retailers and vendors. Geographically, the company generates a majority of revenue from the United States.

name: Via Global Health
description: Operator of a medical supplies marketplace intended to connect medical distributors with affordable medical device manufacturers. The company provides access to difficult-to-source supplies that make it faster, easier, and more affordable to address points of friction that exist between buyers and sellers of medical products through e-catalog and supporting services like logistics, enabling healthcare equipment suppliers to connect with a network of verified local distributors.

name: Looly's
description: Producer of plant-based food products intended to re-engineer preventative healthcare facilities. The company's products are prepared through peer-reviewed research to determine the nutrition goals of each menu that are available in software-enabled mobile cupboards placed at company lobbies, hospitals, bus stations, and universities, enabling consumers to get their nutritional needs fulfilled through fresh, nutritional, and affordable meals.

name: Zeew
description: Developer of an online business development software designed to help businesses launch their digital platform immediately. The company's software has a variety of features that include category management, customer management, payment integration, instant order notification, and restaurant owner settings, enabling restaurants, pharmaceuticals, and other businesses to get a seamless online ordering and delivery experience.

name: Deal Connect
description: Developing a logistics optimization service for scrap metal industry

name: Mailhaven
description: Developer of a mailbox application designed to track packages. The company's mailbox application permits managing of online purchases and automated tracking of shipments, enabling users to simplify package tracking.

name: Skootar
description: Developer of an online courier service booking platform designed to deliver goods and parcels in a convenient and reliable way. The company's online courier service booking platform matches the customer's request for document, parcel and food delivery with on-demand motorbike messenger and delivers the packages in a single trip, enabling customers to design their document workflow routes and get their things delivered quickly.

name: Tradegecko
description: Provider of a cloud-based inventory management software-as-a-service (SaaS) platform intended to automate and reduce workflow inefficiencies. The company's platform integrates front-end e-commerce and POS software with back-end accounting and shipping software, enabling SMBs to manage their inventory efficiently, process orders quickly and change the pricing of their products dynamically.

name: Fulfil.IO
description: Provider of an online inventory management application intended to simplify businesses. The company offers a web-based platform and mobile application that simplifies processes for distributors and retailers with inventory management integrations.

name: Hublogix
description: Provider of a cloud-based e-commerce platform intended to integrate, manage and optimize merchandise sales. The company's cloud-based e-commerce platform connects inventory management services, third-party logistics providers and wholesale distributors to provide a seamless link from an e-commerce platform to one or many fulfillment points to automate inventory, orders and shipment updates enable retailers and branded manufacturers to work in a flexible way.

name: TaskRabbit
description: Provider of an online mobile marketplace designed to help individuals and small businesses outsource their tasks and deliveries. The company's online mobile marketplace matches freelance labor with local demand, enabling users to find immediate help with everyday tasks, including cleaning, moving, delivery and handyman work.

name: Kinnek
description: Operator of an online marketplace for high-cost purchases designed to find suppliers and manage purchasing. The company's online marketplace for high-cost purchases offers a curated way to research equipment or supplies, enabling businesses to seamlessly connect with suppliers.

name: Dsco
description: Provider of a cloud-based drop-shipping platform designed to provide product push and predictive supply chain, models. The company's online platform integrates and manages drop ship partners, inventory, data, and orders by handling the exchange of data through a single connection and integration point, helping trading partners streamline operations, generate more sales, and fulfill more orders using the virtual supply chain.

name: Whiplash Merchandising
description: Developer of an e-commerce software designed to offer order management and warehouse management services. The company's e-commerce software offers integration, order management system (OMS) as well as warehouse management system (WMS) capabilities to emerging brands along with real-time visibility and OMS capabilities, labor management and order fulfillment services, enabling companies to enhance their operations with expanded customer offerings and responsiveness.

name: Erply
description: Provider of cloud-based point of sale and inventory management software designed to help retailers to focus more on business and less on IT. The company's point of sale and inventory management software handles data across physical shops, online stores and offices along with real-time dashboards with relevant data, enabling clients to use a cost effective and technologically superior way for handing centralized management experience.
